name: Jimmy Carter Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 small package (Pk) Chocolate instant pudding mix
1 small Pk Vanilla instant pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust: Mix 1 cup peanuts with 1 cup flour and the softened stick of butter or margarine. Blend together and press into a 13x9-inch pan. Bake for 20 minutes at 300°F. Cool.
2. First Layer: Cream the cream cheese with the peanut butter and 1 cup confectioners' sugar using an electric mixer. Blend in 1 cup whipped topping with a spoon. Spread over the cooled crust carefully.
3. Second Layer: Blend the instant pudding mixes into cold milk. Spread on top of the first layer.
4. Third Layer: Spread the remaining whipped topping on top of the second layer.
5. Fourth Layer: Drizzle chocolate syrup over the whipped topping.
6. Fifth Layer: Sprinkle with the remaining half cup chopped peanuts. Freeze.
7. Serve 1 hour before serving. Refrigerate or refreeze leftovers.
